entities.name: VERTISOL TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A package of options for managing vertisols developed to improve agricultural productivity

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the organization that began research on vertisol technology

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where vertisol technology was implemented and tested

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state where vertisol technology was first tested and demonstrated

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: An Indian state where on-farm trials of vertisol technology were conducted

entities.name: GUJARAT
entities.description: An Indian state where on-farm trials of vertisol technology were conducted

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: An Indian state where on-farm trials of vertisol technology were conducted

entities.name: MADHYA PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state where on-farm trials of vertisol technology were conducted

entities.name: SUMMER CULTIVATION
entities.description: A component of vertisol technology involving cultivation during the summer season

entities.name: DRY SEEDING
entities.description: A component of vertisol technology involving seeding in dry soil

entities.name: CROP PROTECTION
entities.description: A component of vertisol technology focused on protecting crops from pests and diseases

entities.name: IMPROVED VARIETIES
entities.description: A component of vertisol technology utilizing higher-yielding or more resilient crop varieties

entities.name: PROPER PLACEMENT OF SEED AND FERTILIZER
entities.description: A component of vertisol technology regarding the precise positioning of seeds and nutrients

entities.name: ON-FARM TRIALS
entities.description: Field tests conducted on farmers' land to understand adoption dynamics

entities.name: SURVEY
entities.description: A data collection method using questionnaires to assess adoption and perceptions

entities.name: LOW-RAINFALL REGIONS
entities.description: Areas characterized by low precipitation where farmers were interviewed

entities.name: MEDIUM-RAINFALL REGIONS
entities.description: Areas characterized by medium precipitation where farmers were interviewed

entities.name: HIGH-RAINFALL REGIONS
entities.description: Areas characterized by high precipitation where farmers were interviewed

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY BENEFITS
entities.description: The long-term environmental and economic advantages perceived by farmers from vertisol technology

entities.name: ON-FARM BENEFITS
entities.description: The direct economic gains realized by farmers from the adoption of vertisol technology

relationships.source: PROPER PLACEMENT OF SEED AND FERTILIZER
